AC-01.evidence: Manual test: typed title, pressed Enter. Task appeared in list within ~80ms. Optimistic update confirmed via network tab - UI updated before API response.

AC-02.evidence: Verified in Chrome 124 and Firefox 125. Input received focus on page load without user interaction. `useEffect` + `inputRef.current?.focus()` pattern works correctly.

AC-03.evidence: After fix (title.trim().length === 0 guard added): entering '   ' (3 spaces) shows 'Task title cannot be empty' inline below the field. Form is not submitted. Confirmed with single space, multiple spaces, and tab character. ISSUE-001 partially resolved - client trim now correct. Server validation also confirmed as backup.

AC-04.evidence: Typed 201 characters. Character counter shows '201/200' in red. Submit button disabled. Removed one character - counter returns to black, button enabled.

AC-05.evidence: Slowed network to 'Slow 3G' in DevTools. Spinner visible on Add button, input disabled. On success: spinner disappears, input clears, task appears.

AC-06.evidence: Injected 500 response via mock. Error 'Something went wrong - please try again' shown below form. Previously entered title 'Buy milk' preserved in input field after error.

AC-07.evidence: Chrome DevTools mobile simulation at 375px. Input and Add button are full-width. Error message wraps cleanly at 375px, no overflow. Tap target size acceptable.

AC-08.evidence: Set FEATURE_TASK_CREATION=false, restarted dev server. Task creation form route returns null - no form rendered. Set back to true - form renders. Both paths confirmed.

verifier_context.additional_context: Read ISSUE-001 from STATE.json known_issues to understand the whitespace trim gap before testing AC-03. This is scoped state access, not implementation context.
